claims.summary: The product chat follows the selected live instance policy.

productionPathReuse.runtime: local live server selected by eval live discovery
productionPathReuse.notes: The runner invokes the selected product instance instead of replaying a copied prompt.

inputSimulation.summary: The runner sends normalized live-run requests to the same instance boundary used by eval live invocation.

externalSubstitution.reason: This assessment targets a selected live product instance; model/provider substitution is intentionally not part of this proof.
knownGaps: Provider nondeterminism remains part of the live proof surface.

triggerControl.summary: The runner owns the request lifecycle and waits for the live invocation result before writing the observed packet.

externalObservation.summary: The live invocation result and evaluator diagnostics are written outside the product response path.

knownGaps: The selected live instance must be reset by host-owned setup outside this generic example.

fingerprint.summary: The observed packet records the selected instance and runtime fingerprint.

stateReusePolicy.summary: The assessment scopes state reuse to the selected instance and requires known gaps when reset is unavailable.

knownGaps: Live instance state reset is host-owned and not declared by this example.
